mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN keyword1 = #{keyword} THEN keyword2 ELSE keyword1 END as related_keyword, relationship_strength as strength, co_occurrence_count as co_occurrence, pmi_score FROM keyword_relationships_summary WHERE (keyword1 = #{keyword} OR keyword2 = #{keyword}) AND segment_filter = 'all' ORDER BY relationship_strength DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT segment_type, COUNT(DISTINCT segment_name) as segment_count, COUNT(*) as keyword_count, ROUND(AVG(confidence_score), 3) as avg_confidence, SUM(total_count) as total_frequency, MAX(total_count) as max_frequency FROM keyword_segments GROUP BY segment_type ORDER BY keyword_count DESC

SELECT segment_name, COUNT(*) as keyword_count, SUM(total_count) as total_frequency, ROUND(AVG(confidence_score), 3) as avg_confidence FROM keyword_segments WHERE segment_type = #{segmentType} GROUP BY segment_name ORDER BY total_frequency DESC

SELECT segment_type, segment_name, COUNT(*) as keyword_count, SUM(total_count) as total_frequency, AVG(confidence_score) as avg_confidence, MAX(total_count) as top_keyword_frequency, SUM(member_count) as total_members, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN total_count >= 10 THEN keyword END ) as high_frequency_keywords FROM keyword_segments GROUP BY segment_type, segment_name ORDER BY segment_type, total_frequency DESC

SELECT segment_name as category, COUNT(*) as keyword_count, SUM(total_count) as total_frequency, ROUND(AVG(confidence_score), 3) as avg_confidence FROM keyword_segments WHERE segment_type = 'category' GROUP BY segment_name ORDER BY total_frequency DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT segment_name as region_code, CASE WHEN segment_name = '11' THEN '서울특별시' WHEN segment_name = '26' THEN '부산광역시' WHEN segment_name = '27' THEN '대구광역시' WHEN segment_name = '28' THEN '인천광역시' WHEN segment_name = '29' THEN '광주광역시' WHEN segment_name = '30' THEN '대전광역시' WHEN segment_name = '31' THEN '울산광역시' WHEN segment_name = '41' THEN '경기도' WHEN segment_name = '42' THEN '강원도' WHEN segment_name = '43' THEN '충청북도' WHEN segment_name = '44' THEN '충청남도' WHEN segment_name = '45' THEN '전라북도' WHEN segment_name = '46' THEN '전라남도' WHEN segment_name = '47' THEN '경상북도' WHEN segment_name = '48' THEN '경상남도' WHEN segment_name = '50' THEN '제주특별자치도' ELSE segment_name END as region_name, COUNT(*) as keyword_count, SUM(total_count) as total_frequency, SUM(member_count) as total_members FROM keyword_segments WHERE segment_type = 'region' GROUP BY segment_name ORDER BY total_frequency DESC

SELECT segment_name as frequency_level, COUNT(*) as keyword_count, SUM(total_count) as total_frequency, MIN(total_count) as min_frequency, MAX(total_count) as max_frequency, ROUND(AVG(total_count), 2) as avg_frequency FROM keyword_segments WHERE segment_type = 'frequency' GROUP BY segment_name ORDER BY CASE segment_name WHEN 'TOP' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END
